heading: What you'll learn
subhead: Twelve categories, 82 pages, one structured path. Read in order or jump to whatever you need today.

topics.label: Personal Finance
topics.description: Budget, save, and understand compounding before you put any money in the market.

topics.label: Investing 101
topics.description: What investing actually is, why it matters, and how to think about risk and return.

topics.label: Investment Basics
topics.description: Stocks, bonds, mutual funds, ETFs, equity vs. debt.

topics.label: Pakistan Stock Market
topics.description: How PSX works, its indices, and the key participants like CDC, NCCPL, and SECP.

topics.label: Getting Started with PSX
topics.description: Open an account, choose a broker, and place your very first trade.

topics.label: Trading & Orders
topics.description: Order types, trading hours, T+1 settlement, circuit breakers.

topics.label: Corporate Actions
topics.description: Dividends, bonus shares, stock splits, rights issues, book closure.

topics.label: Fundamental Analysis
topics.description: Read financial statements and calculate the ratios that tell you whether a stock is worth buying.

topics.label: Technical Analysis
topics.description: Read price charts, candlesticks, and indicators for short-term price moves.

topics.label: Taxes & Zakat
topics.description: Capital gains tax, dividend tax, filer vs. non-filer status, zakat on stocks.

topics.label: Shariah Investing
topics.description: KMI-30, Shariah screening, and purification of non-compliant income.

topics.label: Glossary
topics.description: Quick reference for the PSX and investing terms you will encounter.
